summary: 8 film announcements, 7 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Hollow
film.talent: Sydney Sweeney (starring), Lindsey Anderson Beer (writing, directing), LuckyChap (producing)
film.announcement: Sony lands the Sleepy Hollow package with Sydney Sweeney starring in the film adaptation, Lindsey Anderson Beer writing and directing, and LuckyChap producing.

film.title: The Musical
film.talent: Rob Lowe, Will Brill, Gillian Jacobs (starring)
film.announcement: Blue Harbor and Variance take U.S. rights to the Sundance film starring Rob Lowe, Will Brill, and Gillian Jacobs.

film.title: How The Cookie Crumbles
film.talent: Giorgia Whigham, Trevor Wallace, Alyssa Milano, Shea Whigham (starring)
film.announcement: R-rated comedy film with Giorgia Whigham, Trevor Wallace, Alyssa Milano, and Shea Whigham in the lead roles.

film.title: Kaet Might Die
film.talent: Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, Zosia Mamet (joining cast), Mercedes Bryce Morgan (director)
film.announcement: Dark comedy from director Mercedes Bryce Morgan adds Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, and Zosia Mamet to its cast.

film.title: The Drill
film.announcement: School shooting-themed dark comedy from director Millicent Hailes stars Rowan Blanchard.

film.title: Mini War
film.talent: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, Rob Morgan (starring)
film.announcement: Comedy film adds Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, and Rob Morgan to its cast.

film.title: I Want To Feel Fun
film.announcement: Improvised indie comedy from writer-director Jessica Sanders stars Michaela Watkins.

film.title: Bender
film.talent: Bill Burr, Chris O'Dowd, Ruari Spooner (starring)
film.announcement: Comedy film adds Harry Potter series star Ruari Spooner to join Bill Burr and Chris O'Dowd.

tv.title: Thunder Road
tv.announcement: West Duchovny joins AMC's NASCAR drama series in a casting announcement.

tv.title: This Summer Will Be Different
tv.talent: Roby Attal, Francesca Reale (casting as Felix and Bridget)
tv.announcement: Netflix series adds Roby Attal and Francesca Reale to the cast in the roles of Felix and Bridget.

tv.title: God of War
tv.announcement: Prime Video series to recast the lead Kratos role following Ryan Hurst's on-set injury during filming.

tv.title: Jakarta
tv.talent: Iko Uwais (starring), Albert Hughes (attached to direct)
tv.announcement: Multi-generational crime series developed at Alcon Entertainment with Iko Uwais starring and Albert Hughes directing.

tv.title: Boys of Tommen
tv.talent: Jamie Schneider (as Patrick Feely), James Craven (as Pierce O'Neill)
tv.announcement: Series casts Jamie Schneider as Patrick Feely and James Craven as Pierce O'Neill.

tv.title: Queenstown
tv.announcement: Netflix unveils Queenstown, its first new series set in New Zealand.

tv.title: The Ultimate Self-Defense Championship Spinoff
tv.announcement: YouTube is launching a female-focused spinoff series from The Ultimate Self-Defense Championship.
